rulings.Case Title: *TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY* IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBERT WILLIAM SIMPSON 04 & JOSEPH MICHAEL GUGHEMETTI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee Respondent Deborah Cullens Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Case
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Deborah Cullen's Motion to Transfer Case to Los Angeles County is granted. Respondent's motion for sanctions is denied. Respondent's Mary Catherine Ayuso's Joinder in Part and Opposition in Part to transfer venue to Merced County is denied. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 11/2/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
